Content Blocks
Clickfunnels Training Part 1 - Elements
This wraps up you mastering the elements, be sure you really grasp all of these before
heading into the next section where you'll now take all of these different elements and
populate them into an entire page.
You can practice by going into your Clickfunnels account side by side this video and
the previous ones until you can put some random concepts together for they could
all work together like what we'll cover in the next section going over 'pages.'
If you'd like to find someone you know builds on all Clickfunnels page use myself or
Russell Brunson as you go-to for funnel hacking concepts. And when you're ready, roll
into the next training!
